prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年哈尔滨工程大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为26479→27081→31426→22548→21660名。2023年出现明显后移至31426名，2024年大幅回升至22548 名，2025年继续前移至21660名，近两年呈持续回暖趋势，2025年基准位次约21660名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年255人、2022年254人、2023年242人 、2024年261人、2025年279人，2026年（招生计划文件）计划279人，与2025年持平，计划总量未发生变化，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工程大学为211工程 、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名从2021年第50名持续上升至2025/2026年第43名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度呈上升趋势，对考生吸引力有所增强；该校在2021–2026年声誉舆情文件中均未出现显著正/负面事件，声誉整体平稳；抖音学校热度总排名第27位（样本14条视频，综合热度约171.7万），评价为较热，短 视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平，张雪峰等升学规划博主多次推荐该校水声工程、核工程等特色专业，有助于维持报考热度；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与 工程获评A等级，为该校唯一A类学科；船舶与海洋工程、水声工程、核工程与核技术等特色专业在行业内具有较高声誉，对理工类考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山 东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），考生规模持续扩大，整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21660名、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、学校软科排名持续上升（50→43名）增强吸引力、山东省考生总 数增加约5.7%加剧竞争、抖音热度较热维持关注度等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约21360名，区间20860–21860名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 核工程与核技术（兴海领军/钱学森班）
- 计算机科学与技术（兴海领军）
- 软件工程（国家特软创新班）
- 船舶与海洋工程（兴海领军/钱学森班）
- 自动化类（自动化、机器人工程、人工智能等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（水声工程、电子信息工程、通信工程等）
- 水声工程（含水声、电子水声、海洋信息）
- 海洋工程类（船舶与海洋工程、海洋机器人等）
- 航空航天类（飞行器设计与工程、飞行器动力工程等）
- 核工程与核技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械类（机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计）
- 能源动力类（能源与动力工程、轮机工程）
- 应用物理学
- 数学与应用数学
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、化学工程与工艺）
- 大数据管理与应用。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间20860–21860名内的考生，建议以二档专业为主力填报方向，一档专业（兴海领军班/钱学森班/计算机类）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优 于区间下限（如20000名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（21800名左右）建议以二档为主、三档保底。该校自动化类（控制科学与工程A学科）性价比突出， 值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Harbin Engineering University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were 26479 → 27081 → 31426 → 22548 → 21660. In 2023, there was a significant shift to 31426, followed by a substantial recovery to 22548 in 2024, and continued advancement to 21660 in 2025, showing a sustained warming trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 21660 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 255 in 2021, 254 in 2022, 242 in 2023, 261 in 2024, and 279 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan (enrollment plan document) is 279, unchanged from 2025, with no change in total plan size, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Engineering University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has steadily increased from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2025/2026, indicating a rising trend in comprehensive strength and recognition, enhancing its appeal to candidates. From 2021 to 2026, no significant positive or negative events were recorded in the university's reputation and public opinion files, maintaining overall stability. The university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 27th (sample of 14 videos, comprehensive popularity approximately 1.717 million), rated as relatively hot, with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level. Study planning bloggers such as Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended the university's specialized programs like underwater acoustic engineering and nuclear engineering, helping to sustain application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A level, the only A-class discipline at the university. Specialized programs such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustic Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology hold high reputations within the industry, providing continuous appeal to science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (approximately 5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025. The candidate pool continues to expand, intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21660, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the university's continuously rising Soft Science ranking (50→43) enhancing appeal, the approximately 5.7% increase in total candidates in Shandong Province intensifying competition, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity maintaining attention, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly advance compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21360, with a range of 20860–21860.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology (Xinghai Leading/Qian Xuesen Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Xinghai Leading)
- Software Engineering (National Special Software Innovation Class)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Xinghai Leading/Qian Xuesen Class)
- Automation (Automation, Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Underwater Acoustic Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.)
- Underwater Acoustic Engineering (including Underwater Acoustics, Electronic Underwater Acoustics, Marine Information)
- Ocean Engineering (Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Marine Robotics, etc.)
- Aerospace Engineering (Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, etc.)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
- Applied Physics
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials Science and Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology)
- Big Data Management and Application
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 20860–21860 are advised to focus on Tier 2 programs as the main direction for application, with Tier 1 programs (Xinghai Leading Class/Qian Xuesen Class/Computer Science) as reach choices, and Tier 3 programs as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 20000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship programs; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 21800) are advised to mainly apply for Tier 2 programs with Tier 3 as backup. The university's Automation (Control Science and Engineering A discipline) offers outstanding value and deserves special attention.
